lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: When Jezebel threatened to kill Elijah, what did Elijah ask God to do?
Who did God choose to replace Elijah as prophet?
What did Elisha do when Elijah placed his coat on him?
answers: Said goodbye to his parents and followed Elijah

questions.text: What did Elijah tell Elisha to do as they traveled?
answers: Never leave him, no matter what

questions.text: How did Elisha respond when Elijah told him to stay?
answers: He said he would not leave and kept following him
He did what Elijah asked and stayed behind
He went back home to his parents
He told Elijah to be quiet

questions.text: What happened when Elijah struck the Jordan River with his coat?
answers: The coat turned into a boat
He caught a large amount of fish

questions.text: What did Elisha ask Elijah for?
answers: A double portion of his spirit

questions.text: What did Elijah say Elisha must do to receive what he asked for?
answers: Watch when Elijah is taken away
Be baptized in the Jordan River

questions.text: How did Elijah leave the earth?
answers: He rode a fiery chariot in a whirlwind
He was carried up by angels
He disappeared in a puff of smoke

questions.text: What happened when Elisha struck the river with Elijah's ccoat?
answers: He struck the river and it parted
A chariot came to also take Elisha to heaven
